mapper.sql: RNMCNO, CS_NM, CS_TYP_CD, BRTH_DT, INDV_CORP_CCD, NAT_CD, ADDR, TEL_NO, EMAIL, ACNT_OPNG_DT, KYC_STS_CCD, EDD_F, RSK_GRD_CD, RSK_SCR, USE_CCD, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT
mapper.select: SELECT FROM NIC01B WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo} AND USE_CCD = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC01B ( RNMCNO, CS_NM, CS_TYP_CD, BRTH_DT, INDV_CORP_CCD, NAT_CD, ADDR, TEL_NO, EMAIL, ACNT_OPNG_DT, KYC_STS_CCD, EDD_F, RSK_GRD_CD, RSK_SCR, USE_CCD, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{custNo}, #{custNm}, #{custTpCd}, #{birthDt}, #{regNo}, #{natCd}, #{addr}, #{tel}, #{email}, #{acctOpenDt}, #{kycStCd}, #{eddYn}, #{riskGrd}, #{riskScr}, #{useYn}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC01B SET CS_NM = #{custNm}, CS_TYP_CD = #{custTpCd}, BRTH_DT = #{birthDt}, INDV_CORP_CCD= #{regNo}, NAT_CD = #{natCd}, ADDR = #{addr}, TEL_NO = #{tel}, EMAIL = #{email}, ACNT_OPNG_DT = #{acctOpenDt}, KYC_STS_CCD = #{kycStCd}, EDD_F = #{eddYn}, RSK_GRD_CD = #{riskGrd}, RSK_SCR = #{riskScr}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo}
UPDATE NIC01B SET RSK_GRD_CD = #{riskGrd}, RSK_SCR = #{riskScr}, EDD_F = #{eddYn}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo}
UPDATE NIC01B SET KYC_STS_CCD = #{kycStCd}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE RNMCNO = #{custNo}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM NIC01B WHERE USE_CCD = 'Y' AND RSK_GRD_CD = 'H' ORDER BY RSK_SCR DESC
